name: Korea G2B Government Procurement MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Korea's G2B (Government to Business) procurement system — the Nara Market platform for Korean government contracts and procurement. Enables AI agents to search and retrieve Korean government procurement opportunities, contract data, and bidding information.
use_cases: Searching Korean government procurement opportunities from business development agents
Monitoring G2B contract announcements for market intelligence agents
Researching Korean public sector procurement for competitive intelligence agents
Building Korea government contract tracking workflows for business agents
not_for: Teams without Korean language capability or Korean business registration
best_when: A Korean business or government contractor wants AI agents to monitor and search Korea's G2B procurement platform — surfacing relevant bidding opportunities and contract information.
avoid_when: You don't do business with Korean government agencies. G2B is specifically for Korea's public procurement ecosystem.

auth.notes: Korea G2B/Nara Market API key required. Korean business registration may be needed for API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Korea G2B API is publicly available for registered businesses
pricing.notes: Free open source MCP server. G2B API access registration required.

known_agent_gotchas: Content primarily in Korean — Korean language processing required
G2B API access may require Korean business registration
Government API availability can be limited during peak periods
Procurement data includes legal and contractual information — verify accuracy before acting
Community implementation — limited documentation and maintenance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Korean government procurement data. Korean data residency. API key security. Contractual data accuracy must be verified.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public procurement data. Korean government system. API key security. Verify contractual accuracy.
